description:
On the next This is My Architecture, Michel from mimik explains how their hybrid edge cloud platform enables service mesh using edgeEngine supported by AWS services to enable direct device-to-device communication at the edge. You will learn how EKS, DynamoDB, and MongoDB are used to help manage the mesh network and how Kinesis, S3, and Snowflake are used to monitor it. 

Additional links to collateral: 
https://youtu.be/2-FGJlSHTFI  
https://developer.mimik.com

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​ cloud: 
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: mimik: Hybrid Edge Cloud Leveraging AWS to Support Edge Microservice Mesh
